title: Market Movers blog: Markets unmoved by central bank holds

excerpt: Markets showed little reaction to central bank decisions, with European markets remaining flat. Analysts debate future interest rate trends in the UK, US, and eurozone. Investment Week's Market Movers blog covers these developments.
